languages.text: "Уничижительное определение семантически неуместно в твоем изречении, примитивное создание". {n}Металлическая пластина, заменяющая ксеносу лицо, не выражает эмоций, но в движениях его многочисленных конечностей сквозит недовольство.{/n} "Ты действительно узрел Смотрителя, которому Неисчислимый вверил обережение внешних врат Музеона".

"A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."
languages.original_text: "Уничижительное определение семантически неуместно в твоем изречении, примитивное создание". {n}Металлическая пластина, заменяющая ксеносу лицо, не выражает эмоций, но в движениях его многочисленных конечностей сквозит недовольство.{/n} "Ты действительно узрел Смотрителя, которому Неисчислимый вверил обережение внешних врат Музеона".

"A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."

"A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."

languages.text: “原始生物，你话语中的贬义定义，在语义层面并不适用。”{n}那取代了异形面孔的金属板毫无表情，但你能从他众多肢体的动作中读出不悦。{/n}“你所看到的是看守者，其被无限者委任守护陈列馆外围大门。”
languages.original_text: "A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."

traits.locale_text: “原始生物，你话语中的贬义定义，在语义层面并不适用。”{n}那取代了异形面孔的金属板毫无表情，但你能从他众多肢体的动作中读出不悦。{/n}“你所看到的是看守者，其被无限者委任守护陈列馆外围大门。”

languages.text: «Una definición peyorativa es algo semánticamente inapropiado en tus palabras, ser primitivo». {n}La placa de metal que el xenos tiene por rostro no muestra emoción, pero los movimientos de sus numerosas extremidades reflejan su desagrado, o por lo menos eso interpretas.{/n} «Efectivamente, has contemplado al guardián a quien el Infinito ha encomendado proteger las puertas exteriores del Museion».
languages.original_text: "A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."

traits.locale_text: «Una definición peyorativa es algo semánticamente inapropiado en tus palabras, ser primitivo». {n}La placa de metal que el xenos tiene por rostro no muestra emoción, pero los movimientos de sus numerosas extremidades reflejan su desagrado, o por lo menos eso interpretas.{/n} «Efectivamente, has contemplado al guardián a quien el Infinito ha encomendado proteger las puertas exteriores del Museion».

languages.text: « Cette expression péjorative est inappropriée d'un point de vue sémantique quand elle est prononcée par une créature aussi primitive que vous. » {n}La plaque métallique remplaçant le visage du xénos n'affiche aucune expression, mais vous devinez son déplaisir à la manière dont bougent ses multiples membres.{/n} « Vous avez effectivement aperçu le gardien, à qui l'Infini a confié la protection des portes extérieures du Muséion. »
languages.original_text: "A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."

traits.locale_text: « Cette expression péjorative est inappropriée d'un point de vue sémantique quand elle est prononcée par une créature aussi primitive que vous. » {n}La plaque métallique remplaçant le visage du xénos n'affiche aucune expression, mais vous devinez son déplaisir à la manière dont bougent ses multiples membres.{/n} « Vous avez effectivement aperçu le gardien, à qui l'Infini a confié la protection des portes extérieures du Muséion. »

languages.text: "Aşağılayıcı bir tanım, anlamsal olarak söyleminle uyumsuz ilkel yaratık." {n}Zenonun yüzünün yerini alan metal plaka, hiçbir duygu göstermiyor. Yine de çok sayıdaki uzuvlarının hareketlerinden hoşnutsuzluğunu okuyorsun.{/n} "Gerçekten de Mutlak'ın Museion'un dış kapılarının korunmasını emanet ettiği Muhafız'ı gördün."
languages.original_text: "A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."

traits.locale_text: "Aşağılayıcı bir tanım, anlamsal olarak söyleminle uyumsuz ilkel yaratık." {n}Zenonun yüzünün yerini alan metal plaka, hiçbir duygu göstermiyor. Yine de çok sayıdaki uzuvlarının hareketlerinden hoşnutsuzluğunu okuyorsun.{/n} "Gerçekten de Mutlak'ın Museion'un dış kapılarının korunmasını emanet ettiği Muhafız'ı gördün."

languages.text: "Die pejorative Definition Eurer Aussage ist semantisch unangemessen, primitive Kreatur." {n}Die Metallplatte, die das Gesicht des Xenos ersetzt, zeigt keinerlei Regung, aber du erkennst das Missfallen in den Bewegungen seiner vielen Gliedmaßen.{/n} "Ihr habt in der Tat den Wächter erblickt, den der Unendliche mit dem Schutz der äußeren Tore des Museions betraut hat."
languages.original_text: "A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."

traits.locale_text: "Die pejorative Definition Eurer Aussage ist semantisch unangemessen, primitive Kreatur." {n}Die Metallplatte, die das Gesicht des Xenos ersetzt, zeigt keinerlei Regung, aber du erkennst das Missfallen in den Bewegungen seiner vielen Gliedmaßen.{/n} "Ihr habt in der Tat den Wächter erblickt, den der Unendliche mit dem Schutz der äußeren Tore des Museions betraut hat."

languages.text: 「侮蔑的な定義は、お前の発話においては意味論的に不適切だ、原始的な生き物よ。」{n}異種族の顔を覆う金属板は何の感情も示さないが、その無数の肢の動きから、君は不快の色を読み取る。{/n}「いかにもお前は、〈無限〉がムセイオンの外門の守護を託した守護者を、その目で見たのだ。」
languages.original_text: "A pejorative definition is semantically inappropriate in your utterance, primitive creature." {n}The metal plate replacing the xenos's face shows no emotion, but you read displeasure in the movements of his many limbs.{/n} "You have indeed beheld the Warden to whom the Infinite has entrusted the protection of the outer gates of the Museion."

traits.locale_text: 「侮蔑的な定義は、お前の発話においては意味論的に不適切だ、原始的な生き物よ。」{n}異種族の顔を覆う金属板は何の感情も示さないが、その無数の肢の動きから、君は不快の色を読み取る。{/n}「いかにもお前は、〈無限〉がムセイオンの外門の守護を託した守護者を、その目で見たのだ。」
